ascoril.usage: Used for relief from productive cough and chest congestion.
ascoril.best_time: Use according to the prescribed schedule.
ascoril.precautions: Avoid self-medication and follow label instructions.

augmentin.best_time: Often taken with food to reduce stomach discomfort.
augmentin.precautions: Use only when prescribed by a healthcare professional.

azithromycin.best_time: Take exactly as directed by a healthcare professional.
azithromycin.precautions: Do not stop treatment early without medical advice.

cetirizine.usage: Used for allergy symptoms such as sneezing and itching.
cetirizine.best_time: Often taken in the evening if drowsiness occurs.
cetirizine.precautions: May cause drowsiness in some people.

combiflam.usage: Used for pain relief and fever reduction.
combiflam.best_time: Generally taken after food if advised.

crocin.usage: Used for fever and pain relief.
crocin.best_time: Can be taken with or without food.

dolo_650.usage: Used to reduce fever and relieve mild to moderate pain.
dolo_650.best_time: Can be taken with or without food.

pantoprazole.usage: Used for acidity, reflux, and stomach ulcer conditions.
pantoprazole.best_time: Often taken before meals as directed.
pantoprazole.precautions: Do not alter treatment without medical advice.

sinarest.usage: Used for common cold symptoms and nasal congestion.
sinarest.best_time: Use according to package or professional instructions.

zincovit.dosage: Follow product or healthcare professional guidance.
